name: Mutual Exclusion
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MutualExclusion ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences

CONSTANT N \* Number of processes

VARIABLES
    state \* state[p] ∈ {"idle", "trying", "critical"} for each process p

(* Initial state: all processes are idle *)
Init == 
    /\ state = [p \in 1..N |-> "idle"]

(* Helper predicate: a process p is allowed to enter critical section *)
CanEnter(p) == 
    /\ state[p] = "trying"
    /\ \A q \in 1..N : q # p => state[q] # "critical"

(* Transition for a process p *)
Next == 
    \E p \in 1..N :
        \/ /\ state[p] = "idle"
           /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "trying"]
        \/ /\ CanEnter(p)
           /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "critical"]
        \/ /\ state[p] = "critical"
           /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "idle"]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_state

(* Type invariant: state values are within the allowed set *)
TypeOK == 
    /\ state \in [1..N -> {"idle", "trying", "critical"}]
    /\ \A p \in 1..N : state[p] ∈ {"idle", "trying", "critical"}

name: Two-Phase Commit
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommit ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC

CONSTANTS
    N \in Nat \setminus {0}
    Participants \in SUBSET 1..N
    Coordinator \in 1..N \setminus Participants

VARIABLES
    state,
    msgQueue,
    coordinatorState

(* Participant states *)
ParticipantState == {"Idle", "Prepared", "Committed", "Aborted"}

(* Coordinator states *)
CoordinatorState == {"Idle", "Preparing", "Deciding", "Committing", "Aborting"}

(* Message types *)
MessageType == {"Prepare", "VoteYes", "VoteNo", "Commit", "Abort"}

(* Message record *)
Message == [type: MessageType, from: 1..N, to: 1..N]

(* Initial state *)
Init ==
    /\ state \in [p \in Participants |-> "Idle"]
    /\ msgQueue = <<>>
    /\ coordinatorState = "Idle"

(* Sending a message *)
Send(msg) ==
    /\ msg \in Message
    /\ msgQueue' = Append(msgQueue, msg)
    /\ UNCHANGED <<state, coordinatorState>>

(* Receiving a message *)
Receive(msg) ==
    /\ msg \in Message
    /\ msgQueue' = Tail(msgQueue)
    /\ UNCHANGED <<state, coordinatorState>>

(* Participant behavior *)
ParticipantStep(p) ==
    /\ p \in Participants
    /\ LET m == Head(msgQueue) IN
    /\ m.to = p
    /\ m.type = "Prepare"
    /\ state[p] = "Idle"
    /\ state[p]' = "Prepared"
    /\ Send([type |-> "VoteYes", from |-> p, to |-> Coordinator])
    /\ UNCHANGED coordinatorState

(* Coordinator behavior *)
CoordinatorStep ==
    /\ coordinatorState = "Idle"
    /\ LET m == Head(msgQueue) IN
    /\ m.to = Coordinator
    /\ m.type = "Prepare"
    /\ coordinatorState' = "Preparing"
    /\ UNCHANGED state

(* Coordinator sends Prepare to all participants *)
SendPrepare ==
    /\ coordinatorState = "Preparing"
    /\ /\ \E p \in Participants :
        /\ msgQueue' = Append(msgQueue, [type |-> "Prepare", from |-> Coordinator, to |-> p])
    /\ coordinatorState' = "Deciding"
    /\ UNCHANGED state

(* Coordinator collects votes *)
CollectVotes ==
    /\ coordinatorState = "Deciding"
    /\ LET m == Head(msgQueue) IN
    /\ m.to = Coordin

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC

CONSTANTS N \* Number of philosophers and forks

VARIABLES
    forks,          \* forks[i] = p means fork i is held by philosopher p, 0 means free
    states          \* states[p] ∈ {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}

(* Helper definitions *)
ForkOwner(i) == forks[i]
PhilosopherState(p) == states[p]

(* Initial state: all forks free, all philosophers thinking *)
Init ==
    /\ forks = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
    /\ states = [p \in 1..N |-> "thinking"]

(* Helper predicates *)
LeftFork(p) == IF p = 1 THEN N ELSE p - 1
RightFork(p) == IF p = N THEN 1 ELSE p + 1

CanTakeForks(p) ==
    /\ ForkOwner(LeftFork(p)) = 0
    /\ ForkOwner(RightFork(p)) = 0

TakeForks(p) ==
    /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![LeftFork(p)] = p, ![RightFork(p)] = p]
    /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![p] = "eating"]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<>>

PutForks(p) ==
    /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![LeftFork(p)] = 0, ![RightFork(p)] = 0]
    /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![p] = "thinking"]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<>>

(* Action: philosopher p becomes hungry *)
Hungry(p) ==
    /\ states[p] = "thinking"
    /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![p] = "hungry"]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<>>

(* Action: philosopher p starts eating if forks available *)
StartEating(p) ==
    /\ states[p] = "hungry"
    /\ CanTakeForks(p)
    /\ TakeForks(p)

(* Action: philosopher p finishes eating *)
FinishEating(p) ==
    /\ states[p] = "eating"
    /\ PutForks(p)

(* Next-state relation *)
Next ==
    \E p \in 1..N :
        (Hungry(p) \/ StartEating(p) \/ FinishEating(p))

(* Specification *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, states>>

(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK ==
    /\ forks \in [1..N -> 1..N]
    /\ states \in [1..N -> {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}]

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC

CONSTANT N \* number of processes

VARIABLES
    flag, \* [1..N -> BOOLEAN]
    num   \* [1..N -> Nat]

(* Helper functions *)
maxNum(i) == IF i = 1 THEN 0 ELSE MAX(num[1..i-1])

(* Initialization *)
Init ==
    /\ flag = [j \in 1..N |-> FALSE]
    /\ num   = [j \in 1..N |-> 0]

(* Next-state relation *)
Next ==
    \E i \in 1..N :
        /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
        /\ num'  = [num EXCEPT ![i] = maxNum(i) + 1]
        /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]
        /\ UNCHANGED << flag, num >>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<flag, num>>

(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK ==
    /\ flag \in [1..N -> BOOLEAN]
    /\ num   \in [1..N -> Nat]

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFO ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC

CONSTANT K \* Capacity of the queue

VARIABLES q, head, tail, size

(* q is a sequence of length K, storing the elements *)
(* head and tail are indices in 0..K-1 *)
(* size is the number of elements in the queue *)

Init ==
  /\ q \in Seq(0..K-1, Nat)  \* initial empty queue
  /\ head = 0
  /\ tail = 0
  /\ size = 0

ProducerAction ==
  /\ size < K
  /\ LET newVal == CHOOSE v \in Nat : TRUE
     IN /\ q' = [i \in 0..K-1 |-> IF i = tail THEN newVal ELSE q[i]]
        /\ tail' = (tail + 1) \bmod K
        /\ size' = size + 1
        /\ head' = head
        /\ q = q

ConsumerAction ==
  /\ size > 0
  /\ LET consumed == q[head]
     IN /\ q' = q
        /\ head' = (head + 1) \bmod K
        /\ size' = size - 1
        /\ tail' = tail
        /\ consumed \in Nat

Next ==
  ProducerAction \/ ConsumerAction

Spec ==
  Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, size>>

TypeOK ==
  /\ q \in Seq(0..K-1, Nat)
  /\ head \in 0..K-1
  /\ tail \in 0..K-1
  /\ size \in 0..K

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftLeaderElection ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC

CONSTANTS
    N \in Nat \{1} \* number of servers
    Servers \in SUBSET 1..N

VARIABLES
    currentTerm, \* Nat
    votedFor, \* [server -> 1..N \cup {None}]
    state \* [server -> {"Follower", "Candidate", "Leader"}]

(* Helper constants *)
None \in 1..N \cup {None}

(* Initial state *)
Init ==
    /\ currentTerm = 0
    /\ votedFor = [s \in Servers |-> None]
    /\ state = [s \in Servers |-> "Follower"]

(* Majority threshold *)
Majority == (N \div 2) + 1

(* Vote request from candidate s *)
RequestVote(s) ==
    /\ state[s] = "Candidate"
    /\ currentTerm = currentTerm
    /\ votedFor[s] = None
    /\ votedFor' = [votedFor EXCEPT ![s] = s]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<currentTerm, state>>

(* Vote granted by follower f to candidate s *)
GrantVote(f, s) ==
    /\ state[f] = "Follower"
    /\ currentTerm = currentTerm
    /\ votedFor[f] = None
    /\ votedFor' = [votedFor EXCEPT ![f] = s]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<currentTerm, state>>

(* Count votes for candidate s *)
VoteCount(s) ==
    LET votes == {f \in Servers : votedFor[f] = s}
    IN Cardinality(votes)

(* Candidate becomes leader if majority *)
BecomeLeader(s) ==
    /\ VoteCount(s) >= Majority
    /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![s] = "Leader"]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<currentTerm, votedFor>>

(* Candidate starts election *)
StartElection(s) ==
    /\ state[s] = "Follower"
    /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm + 1
    /\ votedFor' = [votedFor EXCEPT ![s] = s]
    /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![s] = "Candidate"]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<currentTerm, votedFor>>

(* Next-state relation *)
Next ==
    \E s \in Servers :
        \/ RequestVote(s)
        \/ GrantVote(s, s)
        \/ BecomeLeader(s)
        \/ StartElection(s)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK ==
    /\ currentTerm \in Nat
    /\ votedFor \in [Servers -> 1..N \cup {None}]
    /\ state \in [Servers -> {"Follower", "Candidate", "Leader"}]

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

Init ==
   /\ readers = 0
   /\ writer_active = FALSE

ReaderEnter ==
   /\ writer_active = FALSE
   /\ readers' = readers + 1
   /\ writer_active' = writer_active

ReaderExit ==
   /\ readers > 0
   /\ readers' = readers - 1
   /\ writer_active' = writer_active

WriterEnter ==
   /\ writer_active = FALSE
   /\ readers = 0
   /\ writer_active' = TRUE
   /\ readers' = readers

WriterExit ==
   /\ writer_active = TRUE
   /\ writer_active' = FALSE
   /\ readers' = readers

Next ==
   \/ ReaderEnter
   \/ ReaderExit
   \/ WriterEnter
   \/ WriterExit

Spec ==
   Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

name: Distributed Snapshot (Chandy-Lamport)
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ChandyLamportSnapshot ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC

CONSTANTS
    N, Proc, Channels

ASSUME
    /\ N \in Nat
    /\ N > 0
    /\ Proc \subseteq 1..N
    /\ Channels \subseteq Proc \X Proc

VARIABLES
    state,
    channel,
    markerSent,
    snapshotTaken,
    channelState

IsMarker(m) == m = "marker"

Init ==
    /\ \A p \in Proc: snapshotTaken[p] = FALSE
    /\ \A p \in Proc: state[p] = 0
    /\ \A p \in Proc: \A q \in Proc: channel[(p,q)] = <<>>
    /\ \A p \in Proc: \A q \in Proc: markerSent[(p,q)] = FALSE
    /\ \A p \in Proc: \A q \in Proc: channelState[(p,q)] = <<>>

SendMarker(p) ==
    /\ snapshotTaken[p] = TRUE
    /\ \A q \in Proc: q # p
    /\ \A q \in Proc: markerSent[(p,q)] = FALSE
    /\ \A q \in Proc: channel[(p,q)] = Append(channel[(p,q)], "marker")
    /\ \A q \in Proc: markerSent[(p,q)] = TRUE

ReceiveMsg(p, q, m) ==
    /\ channel[(q,p)] # <<>>
    /\ m = Head(channel[(q,p)])
    /\ channel[(q,p)] = Tail(channel[(q,p)])
    /\ IF IsMarker(m) THEN
          IF markerSent[(q,p)] = FALSE THEN
              /\ snapshotTaken[p] = FALSE
              /\ snapshotTaken[p] := TRUE
              /\ state[p] := state[p] + 1
              /\ SendMarker(p)
              /\ channelState[(q,p)] := <<>>
          ELSE
              /\ channelState[(q,p)] := Append(channelState[(q,p)], m)
      ELSE
          /\ channelState[(q,p)] := Append(channelState[(q,p)], m)

Next ==
    \E p \in Proc:
        \E q \in Proc:
            \E m \in {"marker", "data"}:
                /\ ReceiveMsg(p, q, m)

Spec ==
    Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, channel, markerSent, snapshotTaken, channelState>>

name: Token Ring
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TokenRing ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences

CONSTANTS N \* Number of nodes in the ring

VARIABLE token \* Current holder of the token (1..N)

(* Initial state: token starts at node 1 *)
Init == 
  /\ token \in 1..N
  /\ token = 1

(* Action: pass the token to the next node in the ring *)
PassToken == 
  /\ token' = IF token = N THEN 1 ELSE token + 1

(* Action: send a message (only allowed by the token holder) *)
SendMessage == 
  /\ token' = token

(* Next-state relation: either pass the token or send a message *)
Next == PassToken \/ SendMessage

(* Specification *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_token

(* Optional type invariant *)
TypeOK == token \in 1..N

name: Simple Key-Value Store
generated_spec:
---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC

CONSTANTS
    Keys,          \* finite set of keys
    Values         \* finite set of values

VARIABLES
    store          \* mapping from Keys to Values

(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
(* Initial state: all keys map to a special initial value *)
Init == 
    /\ store \in [Keys -> Values]
    /\ \A k \in Keys: store[k] = Values[1]   \* assume Values[1] is the initial value

(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
(* Put operation: update the value for a key *)
Put(k, v) == 
    /\ k \in Keys
    /\ v \in Values
    /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v]
    /\ UNCHANGED << >>

(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
(* Get operation: read the value for a key *)
Get(k) == 
    /\ k \in Keys
    /\ store' = store
    /\ UNCHANGED << >>

(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
(* Next-state relation: either a Put or a Get *)
Next == 
    \E k \in Keys, v \in Values: Put(k, v)
    \/ \E k \in Keys: Get(k)

(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
(* Specification *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<store>>

(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK == 
    /\ store \in [Keys -> Values]

name: Paxos Single-Decree
generated_spec:
---- MODULE SingleDecreePaxos ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC

CONSTANTS
    N \in Nat,          \* Number of acceptors
    M \in Nat,          \* Number of proposers
    Values \subseteq Nat \* Set of possible values

VARIABLES
    ballot,            \* Current ballot number (Nat)
    promised,          \* promised[acceptor] = highest promised ballot (Nat)
    accepted,          \* accepted[acceptor] = [ballot, value] or nil
    chosen             \* chosen value (value or nil)

(* Helper definitions *)
HighestAccepted(a) == 
    IF a = {} THEN [ballot |-> 0, value |-> nil]
    ELSE CHOOSE v \in a : v.ballot = MAX \{ v'.ballot : v' \in a \}

(* Initial state *)
Init == 
    /\ ballot = 0
    /\ promised = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
    /\ accepted = [i \in 1..N |-> nil]
    /\ chosen = nil

(* Proposer actions *)
Prepare(p, b) == 
    /\ p \in 1..M
    /\ b > ballot
    /\ ballot' = b
    /\ UNCHANGED <<promised, accepted, chosen>>

Promise(a, b, aAccepted) == 
    /\ a \in 1..N
    /\ b = ballot
    /\ promised'[a] = b
    /\ accepted'[a] = aAccepted
    /\ UNCHANGED <<ballot, chosen>>

Accept(p, b, v) == 
    /\ p \in 1..M
    /\ b = ballot
    /\ v \in Values
    /\ UNCHANGED <<promised, chosen>>
    /\ accepted' = [accepted EXCEPT ![a] = IF promised[a] = b THEN [ballot |-> b, value |-> v] ELSE @]

Chosen(v) == 
    /\ chosen' = v
    /\ UNCHANGED <<ballot, promised, accepted>>

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == 
    \E p \in 1..M, b \in Nat : Prepare(p, b)
    \/ \E a \in 1..N, b \in Nat, aAccepted \in [ballot:Nat, value:Nat] : Promise(a, b, aAccepted)
    \/ \E p \in 1..M, b \in Nat, v \in Values : Accept(p, b, v)
    \/ \E v \in Values : Chosen(v)

(* Specification *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<ballot, promised, accepted, chosen>>

(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK == 
    /\ ballot \in Nat
    /\ promised \in [1..N -> Nat]
    /\ accepted \in [1..N -> ( [ballot:Nat, value:Nat] \/ {nil} )]
    /\ chosen \in Values \/ {nil}

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE FileTransfer ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC

CONSTANTS MAX_RETRIES, CHUNK_SIZE, FILE_SIZE

VARIABLES
    fileChunks,          \* Sequence of chunks to send
    sentChunks,          \* Sequence of chunks that have been sent
    receivedChunks,      \* Sequence of chunks that have been received
    retransmitCount,     \* Number of retransmissions attempted for current chunk
    currentChunkIndex,   \* Index of the chunk currently being sent
    channelState         \* State of the channel: "OK" or "LOST"

(* Helper definitions *)
Chunk(i) == SubSeq(fileChunks, i, i)

(* Initial state *)
Init ==
    /\ fileChunks = SubSeq(Seq(1..FILE_SIZE), 1, FILE_SIZE)
    /\ sentChunks = <<>>
    /\ receivedChunks = <<>>
    /\ retransmitCount = 0
    /\ currentChunkIndex = 1
    /\ channelState = "OK"

(* Sending a chunk *)
SendChunk ==
    /\ currentChunkIndex <= Len(fileChunks)
    /\ channelState = "OK"
    /\ sentChunks' = Append(sentChunks, Chunk(currentChunkIndex))
    /\ retransmitCount' = 0
    /\ currentChunkIndex' = currentChunkIndex + 1
    /\ UNCHANGED <<receivedChunks, channelState>>

(* Simulate possible loss of the last sent chunk *)
Loss ==
    /\ channelState' = "LOST"
    /\ UNCHANGED <<sentChunks, receivedChunks, retransmitCount, currentChunkIndex>>

(* Simulate successful delivery of the last sent chunk *)
Deliver ==
    /\ channelState' = "OK"
    /\ receivedChunks' = Append(receivedChunks, Chunk(currentChunkIndex - 1))
    /\ UNCHANGED <<sentChunks, retransmitCount, currentChunkIndex>>

(* Retransmission attempt *)
Retransmit ==
    /\ channelState = "LOST"
    /\ retransmitCount < MAX_RETRIES
    /\ retransmitCount' = retransmitCount + 1
    /\ UNCHANGED <<fileChunks, sentChunks, receivedChunks, currentChunkIndex, channelState>>

(* Give up after max retries *)
GiveUp ==
    /\ channelState = "LOST"
    /\ retransmitCount = MAX_RETRIES
    /\ currentChunkIndex' = currentChunkIndex + 1
    /\ retransmitCount' = 0
    /\ UNCHANGED <<fileChun

name: Transaction Isolation (Snapshot Isolation)
generated_spec:
---- MODULE SnapshotIsolation ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC

VARIABLES
    db,          \* Database: mapping from keys to values
    txns,        \* Set of active transactions
    nextTxId,    \* Next transaction identifier
    reads,       \* Mapping from transaction id to set of keys read
    writes,      \* Mapping from transaction id to mapping of keys to new values
    snapshot,    \* Mapping from transaction id to snapshot of db at begin
    state        \* State of each transaction: "idle", "active", "committed", "aborted"

CONSTANTS
    Keys,        \* Set of keys in the database
    Values       \* Set of possible values

TxActive(t) == state[t] = "active"
TxIdle(t)   == state[t] = "idle"
TxCommitted(t) == state[t] = "committed"
TxAborted(t)   == state[t] = "aborted"

Init ==
    /\ db = [k \in Keys |-> 0]
    /\ txns = {}
    /\ nextTxId = 1
    /\ reads = [t \in 1..0 |-> {}]
    /\ writes = [t \in 1..0 |-> [k \in Keys |-> 0]]
    /\ snapshot = [t \in 1..0 |-> [k \in Keys |-> 0]]
    /\ state = [t \in 1..0 |-> "idle"]

    /\ t \notin txns
    /\ txns' = txns \cup {t}
    /\ nextTxId' = nextTxId + 1
    /\ reads' = [reads EXCEPT ![t] = {}]
    /\ writes' = [writes EXCEPT ![t] = [k \in Keys |-> 0]]
    /\ snapshot' = [snapshot EXCEPT ![t] = db]
    /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![t] = "active"]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<db, txns, reads, writes, snapshot, state>>

Read(t, k) ==
    /\ TxActive(t)
    /\ k \in Keys
    /\ reads' = [reads EXCEPT ![t] = reads[t] \cup {k}]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<db, txns, writes, snapshot, state>>

Write(t, k, v) ==
    /\ TxActive(t)
    /\ k \in Keys
    /\ v \in Values
    /\ writes' = [writes EXCEPT ![t] = [writes[t] EXCEPT ![k] = v]]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<db, txns, reads, snapshot, state>>

Commit(t) ==
    /\ TxActive(t)
    /\ \A k \in Keys :
          /\ writes[t][k] = 0
          \/ \E t' \in txns :
                /\ TxCommitted(t')
                /\ writes[t'][k] = 0
    /\ db' = [k \in Keys |-> IF writes[t][k] = 0 THEN db[k]

name: Clock Synchronisation
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ClockSync ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC

VARIABLES clocks, offsets

CONSTANTS N, epsilon

TypeOK == /\ clocks \in [1..N -> Real]
          /\ offsets \in [1..N -> Int]

Init == /\ clocks = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ offsets = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]

AvgClock == (1 / N) * Sum(i \in 1..N, clocks[i])

StepSize == epsilon / 2

Next ==
  /\ \E i \in 1..N :
        /\ clocks' = [clocks EXCEPT ![i] = clocks[i] + offsets[i]]
        /\ offsets' = offsets
        /\ clocks' = [clocks' EXCEPT ![i] =
                        IF Abs(clocks'[i] - AvgClock) <= StepSize
                        THEN AvgClock
                        ELSE clocks'[i] + Sign(clocks'[i] - AvgClock) * StepSize]
        /\ UNCHANGED <<offsets>>
  /\ \A i \in 1..N :
        /\ clocks' = [clocks EXCEPT ![i] = clocks[i] + offsets[i]]
        /\ offsets' = offsets
        /\ clocks' = [clocks' EXCEPT ![i] =
                        IF Abs(clocks'[i] - AvgClock) <= StepSize
                        THEN AvgClock
                        ELSE clocks'[i] + Sign(clocks'[i] - AvgClock) * StepSize]
        /\ UNCHANGED <<offsets>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<clocks, offsets>>

SyncInvariant ==
  LET maxC == Max(1..N, clocks)
      minC == Min(1..N, clocks)
  IN maxC - minC <= epsilon

THEOREM SyncAfterOneRound == Spec => SyncInvariant

name: Peterson's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Peterson2 ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences

VARIABLES flag, turn

Init == /\ flag = [i \in 0..1 |-> FALSE]
        /\ turn = 0

Next == \E i \in 0..1 :
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
          /\ turn' = 1 - i
          /\ flag' = [flag' EXCEPT ![1-i] = FALSE]
          /\ UNCHANGED <<>>  (* no other variables changed *)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<flag, turn>>

name: Gossip Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE GossipProtocol ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC

CONSTANTS
    N \in Nat \setminus {0} \* Number of nodes
    Updates \in SUBSET Nat \setminus {} \* Set of possible updates

VARIABLES
    infected \in [1..N -> SUBSET Updates] \* Mapping node -> set of updates it has received
    round \in Nat \setminus {0} \* Current round number

(* Helper definitions *)
NodeSet == 1..N
AllUpdates == Updates

(* Initialization: no node has any updates initially *)
Init ==
    /\ infected = [i \in NodeSet |-> {}]
    /\ round = 1

(* A node can send any subset of its updates to any other node *)
Send(i, j, U) ==
    /\ i \in NodeSet
    /\ j \in NodeSet
    /\ i # j
    /\ U \subseteq infected[i]
    /\ infected' = [infected EXCEPT ![j] = @ \cup U]

(* Each round, every node sends its updates to a random other node *)
RoundStep ==
    /\ \E i \in NodeSet, j \in NodeSet : i # j
    /\ \E U \subseteq infected[i] : Send(i, j, U)
    /\ round' = round + 1

(* Next-state relation *)
Next ==
    RoundStep

(* Specification *)
Spec ==
    Init /\ [][Next]_<<infected, round>>

(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK ==
    /\ infected \in [NodeSet -> SUBSET Updates]
    /\ round \in Nat \setminus {0}

name: Simple Allocator
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MemoryAllocator ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC

CONSTANTS
    N, Clients, Pages

ASSUME
    Pages = 1..N

VARIABLES
    free, allocated

(* free: SUBSET Pages  -- set of free pages *)
(* allocated: Client -> SUBSET Pages  -- pages allocated to each client *)

(* Initial state: all pages are free, no client has any pages *)
Init ==
    /\ free = Pages
    /\ \A c \in Clients: allocated[c] = {}

(* Allocate a page to a client *)
Allocate(c, p) ==
    /\ c \in Clients
    /\ p \in free
    /\ free' = free \ {p}
    /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \cup {p}]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<>>

(* Release a page from a client *)
Release(c, p) ==
    /\ c \in Clients
    /\ p \in allocated[c]
    /\ free' = free \cup {p}
    /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \ {p}]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<>>

(* Next-state relation: either allocate or release *)
Next ==
    \E c \in Clients, p \in Pages:
        Allocate(c, p) \/ Release(c, p)

(* Type correctness invariant *)
TypeOK ==
    /\ free \subseteq Pages
    /\ \A c \in Clients: allocated[c] \subseteq Pages
    /\ \A c \in Clients: \A p \in allocated[c] : p \in Pages
    /\ \A c \in Clients: \A p1, p2 \in allocated[c] : p1 = p2
    /\ \A p \in Pages: \A c1, c2 \in Clients : (p \in allocated[c1] /\ p \in allocated[c2]) => c1 = c2

Spec ==
    Init /\ [][Next]_<<free, allocated>>

name: Publish-Subscribe Broker
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Broker ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC

VARIABLES
    subscribers, \* [topic -> SUBSET SUBSCRIBER]
    messages,    \* [topic -> SEQ MESSAGE]
    delivered    \* [topic -> [subscriber -> BOOLEAN]]

(* Types *)
SUBSCRIBER == [id: Nat]
MESSAGE == [id: Nat, topic: Nat, payload: ANY]
Topic == Nat

(* Helper predicates *)
IsSubscriber(s) == s \in SUBSCRIBER
IsMessage(m) == m \in MESSAGE
IsTopic(t) == t \in Topic

(* Initial state *)
Init ==
    /\ subscribers = [t \in Topic |-> {}]
    /\ messages = [t \in Topic |-> <<>>]
    /\ delivered = [t \in Topic |-> [s \in SUBSCRIBER |-> FALSE]]

(* Register a subscriber to a topic *)
Register(sub, topic) ==
    /\ IsSubscriber(sub)
    /\ IsTopic(topic)
    /\ subscribers[topic] = subscribers[topic] \cup {sub}
    /\ delivered[topic][sub] = FALSE

(* Post a message to a topic *)
Post(msg) ==
    /\ IsMessage(msg)
    /\ IsTopic(msg.topic)
    /\ messages[msg.topic] = Append(messages[msg.topic], msg)

(* Deliver messages to subscribers *)
Deliver ==
    /\ \E topic \in Topic :
        /\ \E msg \in messages[topic] :
            /\ \E sub \in subscribers[topic] :
                /\ delivered[topic][sub] = FALSE
                /\ delivered[topic][sub] := TRUE

(* Next-state relation *)
Next ==
    \/ \E sub \in SUBSCRIBER, topic \in Topic : Register(sub, topic)
    \/ \E msg \in MESSAGE : Post(msg)
    \/ Deliver

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<subscribers, messages, delivered>>

(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK ==
    /\ subscribers \in [Topic -> SUBSET SUBSCRIBER]
    /\ messages \in [Topic -> SEQ MESSAGE]
    /\ delivered \in [Topic -> [SUBSCRIBER -> BOOLEAN]]

name: Dekker's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Dekker ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC

VARIABLES turn, wants

Init ==
  /\ turn = 0
  /\ \A i \in {0,1} : wants[i] = FALSE

Next ==
  \E i \in {0,1} :
    /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
    /\ turn' = 1 - i
    /\ \A j \in {0,1} :
          j # i
          /\ wants[j] = FALSE
    /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]

TypeOK ==
  /\ turn \in {0,1}
  /\ wants \in [0..1 -> BOOLEAN]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<turn,wants>>

name: Eventually Consistent Counter
generated_spec:
---- MODULE GCounter ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC

CONSTANTS
    Nodes

VARIABLES
    counts

(* Initial state: all counts are zero *)
Init ==
    /\ counts = [n \in Nodes |-> [m \in Nodes |-> 0]]

(* Increment operation for node i *)
Increment(i) ==
    /\ i \in Nodes
    /\ counts' = [counts EXCEPT ![i][i] = @ + 1]

(* Merge operation between nodes i and j *)
Merge(i, j) ==
    /\ i \in Nodes
    /\ j \in Nodes
    /\ counts' = [counts EXCEPT ![i][k] = Max(counts[i][k], counts[j][k]) : k \in Nodes]

(* Next-state relation: any node can increment or merge with any other node *)
Next ==
    \E i \in Nodes :
        (Increment(i) \/ \E j \in Nodes : Merge(i, j))

(* Global count is the sum of the maximum counts for each node *)
GlobalCount ==
    \Sum n \in Nodes : Max([k \in Nodes |-> counts[k][n]])

(* Invariant: all nodes agree on the global count *)
TypeOK ==
    \A i, j \in Nodes :
        GlobalCount = \Sum n \in Nodes : Max([k \in Nodes |-> counts[i][n]])

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_counts

name: Mutual Exclusion
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MutualExclusion ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences

VARIABLES
    state,
    N

(* Initial state: all processes are idle *)
Init == 
    /\ N \in Nat
    /\ N >= 1
    /\ state = [i \in 1..N |-> "idle"]

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == 
    \E i \in 1..N :
        /\ state[i] = "idle"
        /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "trying"]
    \/ \E i \in 1..N :
        /\ state[i] = "trying"
        /\ \A j \in 1..N : j # i => state[j] # "critical"
        /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "critical"]
    \/ \E i \in 1..N :
        /\ state[i] = "critical"
        /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "idle"]

(* Mutual exclusion invariant: at most one process is in critical state *)
TypeOK == 
    \A i, j \in 1..N : i # j => state[i] # "critical" \/ state[j] # "critical"

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<< state >>

    messages,       \* Set of messages in transit: each message is a tuple (msgType, from, to)

    /\ decision' = decision

ParticipantVoteYes(p) ==

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC

CONSTANTS N

VARIABLES
    forks,          (* forks[i] = j means fork i is held by philosopher j; 0 means free *)
    states          (* states[i] = "thinking" | "hungry" | "eating" *)

(* Helper constants *)
THINKING == "thinking"
HUNGRY == "hungry"
EATING == "eating"

(* Helper functions *)
LEFT(i) == (i - 1) % N
RIGHT(i) == (i + 1) % N

(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK ==
    /\ forks \in [1..N -> 0..N]
    /\ states \in [1..N -> {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}]
    /\ \A i \in 1..N : forks[i] = 0 \/ forks[i] \in 1..N
    /\ \A i \in 1..N : states[i] \in {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}

(* Initial state: all philosophers thinking, all forks free *)
Init ==
    /\ forks = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
    /\ states = [i \in 1..N |-> THINKING]

(* Action: philosopher i becomes hungry *)
Hungry(i) ==
    /\ i \in 1..N
    /\ states[i] = THINKING
    /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = HUNGRY]
    /\ forks' = forks

(* Action: philosopher i picks up forks if both are free *)
PickUp(i) ==
    /\ i \in 1..N
    /\ states[i] = HUNGRY
    /\ forks[LEFT(i)] = 0
    /\ forks[RIGHT(i)] = 0
    /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT
        ![LEFT(i)] = i,
        ![RIGHT(i)] = i]
    /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = EATING]

(* Action: philosopher i puts down forks *)
PutDown(i) ==
    /\ i \in 1..N
    /\ states[i] = EATING
    /\ forks[LEFT(i)] = i
    /\ forks[RIGHT(i)] = i
    /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT
        ![LEFT(i)] = 0,
        ![RIGHT(i)] = 0]
    /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = THINKING]

(* Next-state relation *)
Next ==
    \E i \in 1..N :
        (Hungry(i) \/ PickUp(i) \/ PutDown(i))

Spec ==
    Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, states>>

====

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC

VARIABLES num, flag

CONSTANTS N

(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK == /\ num \in [1..N -> Nat]
          /\ flag \in [1..N -> BOOLEAN]

(* Initial state *)
Init == /\ num \in [1..N -> 0]
        /\ flag \in [1..N -> FALSE]

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == \E i \in 1..N:
          /\ flag[i] = FALSE
          /\ LET maxNum == IF num = [1..N -> 0] THEN 0
                          ELSE Max(num)
             IN /\ flag[i] := TRUE
                /\ num[i] := maxNum + 1
                /\ flag[i] := FALSE

(* Specification *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>>

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFO ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC

CONSTANT K \* Queue capacity

VARIABLES
    queue, \* Sequence of items in the queue
    producer, \* Boolean: TRUE if producer is blocked, FALSE otherwise
    consumer \* Boolean: TRUE if consumer is blocked, FALSE otherwise

TypeOK == 
    /\ queue \in Seq(0..K) \* Items are natural numbers up to K
    /\ producer \in BOOLEAN
    /\ consumer \in BOOLEAN

Init == 
    /\ queue = <<>>
    /\ producer = FALSE
    /\ consumer = FALSE

ProducerAction == 
    /\ producer = FALSE
    /\ Len(queue) < K
    /\ queue' = Append(queue, 1) \* Produce item '1' (placeholder)
    /\ producer' = FALSE
    /\ consumer' = consumer

ConsumerAction == 
    /\ consumer = FALSE
    /\ Len(queue) > 0
    /\ queue' = Tail(queue) \* Consume the first item
    /\ consumer' = FALSE
    /\ producer' = producer

ProducerBlock == 
    /\ producer = FALSE
    /\ Len(queue) = K
    /\ queue' = queue
    /\ producer' = TRUE
    /\ consumer' = consumer

ConsumerBlock == 
    /\ consumer = FALSE
    /\ Len(queue) = 0
    /\ queue' = queue
    /\ consumer' = TRUE
    /\ producer' = producer

Next == 
    \/ ProducerAction
    \/ ConsumerAction
    \/ ProducerBlock
    \/ ConsumerBlock

Spec == 
    /\ Init
    /\ [][Next]_<<queue, producer, consumer>>
    /\ TypeOK

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftLeaderElection ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state

(* -- State definitions -- *)
Follower == state = "Follower"
Candidate == state = "Candidate"
Leader == state = "Leader"

(* -- Type definitions -- *)
TypeOK == /\ state \in {"Follower", "Candidate", "Leader"}
          /\ currentTerm \in Nat
          /\ votedFor \in {"Follower", "Candidate", "Leader"} \cup {None}

(* -- Initial state -- *)
Init == /\ state = "Follower"
        /\ currentTerm = 0
        /\ votedFor = None

(* -- Transition relations -- *)
RequestVote == /\ state = "Follower"
              /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm + 1
              /\ votedFor' = "Candidate"
              /\ state' = "Candidate"

VoteGranted == /\ state = "Candidate"
              /\ votedFor' = "Candidate"

VoteDenied == /\ state = "Candidate"
              /\ votedFor' = None

BecomeLeader == /\ state = "Candidate"
               /\ votedFor = "Candidate"
               /\ state' = "Leader"

(* -- Next-state relation -- *)
Next == \/ RequestVote
       \/ VoteGranted
       \/ VoteDenied
       \/ BecomeLeader

(* -- Specification -- *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC

VARIABLES readers, writer_active



Init == /\ readers = 0
        /\ writer_active = FALSE

(* Reader acquires lock *)
ReaderAcquire == /\ writer_active = FALSE
                 /\ UNCHANGED writer_active
                 /\ readers' = readers + 1
                 /\ UNCHANGED <<writer_active>>

(* Reader releases lock *)
ReaderRelease == /\ readers > 0
                 /\ UNCHANGED writer_active
                 /\ readers' = readers - 1
                 /\ UNCHANGED <<writer_active>>

(* Writer acquires lock *)
WriterAcquire == /\ writer_active = FALSE
                 /\ readers = 0
                 /\ writer_active' = TRUE
                 /\ UNCHANGED <<readers>>

(* Writer releases lock *)
WriterRelease == /\ writer_active = TRUE
                 /\ writer_active' = FALSE
                 /\ UNCHANGED <<readers>>

Next == \/ ReaderAcquire
        \/ ReaderRelease
        \/ WriterAcquire
        \/ WriterRelease

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

TypeOK == /\ readers \in Nat
          /\ writer_active \in BOOLEAN

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE FileTransfer ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC

CONSTANTS
    MAX_RETRIES,
    CHUNK_SIZE,
    FILE_SIZE

VARIABLES
    file,
    chunks,
    sentChunks,
    retransmitCount,
    channel

(* Helper to split file into chunks *)
SplitFile(f, size) == 
    IF Len(f) <= size THEN
        <<f>>
    ELSE
        << SubSeq(f, 1, size) >> \o SplitFile(SubSeq(f, size+1, Len(f)), size)

(* Initial state *)
Init == 
    /\ file \in Seq(1..255)  (* file represented as sequence of bytes *)
    /\ Len(file) = FILE_SIZE
    /\ chunks = SplitFile(file, CHUNK_SIZE)
    /\ sentChunks = <<>>
    /\ retransmitCount = 0
    /\ channel = <<>>

(* Sending a chunk *)
SendChunk == 
    /\ sentChunks = <<>>
    /\ channel = <<>>
    /\ retransmitCount = 0
    /\ chunks' = chunks
    /\ sentChunks' = <<>>
    /\ channel' = <<>>
    /\ UNCHANGED file

(* Transmit a chunk over the channel *)
Transmit == 
    /\ sentChunks = <<>>
    /\ channel = <<>>
    /\ retransmitCount' = retransmitCount + 1
    /\ channel' = << First(chunks) >>
    /\ sentChunks' = <<>>
    /\ chunks' = Tail(chunks)
    /\ UNCHANGED file

(* Receive a chunk from the channel *)
Receive == 
    /\ sentChunks = <<>>
    /\ channel' = <<>>
    /\ sentChunks' = << First(channel) >>
    /\ UNCHANGED << file, chunks, retransmitCount, channel >>

(* Retransmit a chunk if it was lost *)
Retransmit == 
    /\ sentChunks = <<>>
    /\ channel = <<>>
    /\ retransmitCount' = retransmitCount + 1
    /\ channel' = << First(chunks) >>
    /\ sentChunks' = <<>>
    /\ chunks' = Tail(chunks)
    /\ UNCHANGED file

(* Non-deterministic choice of whether a chunk is lost or received *)
SendOrRetransmit == 
    /\ sentChunks = <<>>
    /\ channel = <<>>
    /\ retransmitCount' = retransmitCount + 1
    /\ channel' = << First(chunks) >>
    /\ sentChunks' = <<>>
    /\ chunks' = Tail(chunks)
    /\ UNCHANGED file

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == 
    \/ SendChunk
    \/ Transmit
    \/ Receive
    \/ Retransmit
    \/ SendOrR

name: Transaction Isolation (Snapshot Isolation)
generated_spec:
---- MODULE SnapshotIsolation ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC

VARIABLES
    txns,          \* Set of active transaction IDs
    snapshot,      \* Current snapshot of the database
    db,            \* Current state of the database
    nextTxId,      \* Next transaction ID to assign
    writes,        \* Mapping from transaction ID to set of keys it writes
    readSet,       \* Mapping from transaction ID to set of keys it reads
    abortedTxns    \* Set of aborted transaction IDs

TypeOK ==
    /\ txns \subseteq Nat
    /\ snapshot \in [Nat -> Nat]
    /\ db \in [Nat -> Nat]
    /\ nextTxId \in Nat
    /\ writes \in [Nat -> SUBSET Nat]
    /\ readSet \in [Nat -> SUBSET Nat]
    /\ abortedTxns \subseteq Nat

Init ==
    /\ txns = {}
    /\ snapshot = [k \in Nat |-> 0]
    /\ db = [k \in Nat |-> 0]
    /\ nextTxId = 1
    /\ writes = [t \in Nat |-> {}]
    /\ readSet = [t \in Nat |-> {}]
    /\ abortedTxns = {}

BeginTx ==
    /\ nextTxId \in Nat
    /\ txns' = txns \cup {nextTxId}
    /\ writes' = [writes EXCEPT ![nextTxId] = {}]
    /\ readSet' = [readSet EXCEPT ![nextTxId] = {}]
    /\ abortedTxns' = abortedTxns
    /\ snapshot' = snapshot
    /\ db' = db
    /\ nextTxId' = nextTxId + 1

Read(k) ==
    /\ k \in Nat
    /\ nextTxId \in Nat
    /\ nextTxId \in txns
    /\ readSet' = [readSet EXCEPT ![nextTxId] = readSet[nextTxId] \cup {k}]
    /\ snapshot' = snapshot
    /\ db' = db
    /\ writes' = writes
    /\ abortedTxns' = abortedTxns
    /\ txns' = txns

Write(k) ==
    /\ k \in Nat
    /\ nextTxId \in Nat
    /\ nextTxId \in txns
    /\ writes' = [writes EXCEPT ![nextTxId] = writes[nextTxId] \cup {k}]
    /\ snapshot' = snapshot
    /\ db' = db
    /\ readSet' = readSet
    /\ abortedTxns' = abortedTxns
    /\ txns' = txns

Commit ==
    /\ nextTxId \in Nat
    /\ nextTxId \in txns
    /\ \A k \in writes[nextTxId] : db[k] = snapshot[k]
    /\ db' = [db EXCEPT ![k] = IF k \in writes[nextTxId] THEN snapshot[k] ELSE db[k]]
    /\ snapshot' = db'
    /\ txn

name: Clock Synchronisation
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ClockSync ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC

CONSTANTS
    N \in Nat,          \* Number of nodes
    epsilon \in Nat,    \* Synchronisation tolerance
    maxDrift \in Nat    \* Maximum integer drift per round

VARIABLES
    clocks \in [1..N -> Nat]   \* Current clock values of nodes

(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK == clocks \in [1..N -> Nat]

(* Initialisation: clocks start at 0 *)
Init == clocks = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]

(* Helper: compute the average of all clocks *)
Avg(clocks) == 
    LET sum == \sum i \in 1..N : clocks[i]
    IN sum / N

(* Helper: compute the maximum difference between any two clocks *)
MaxDiff(clocks) ==
    LET diffs == [i \in 1..N |-> [j \in 1..N |-> Abs(clocks[i] - clocks[j])]]
    IN \max i \in 1..N : \max j \in 1..N : diffs[i][j]

(* Helper: compute the drift for each node *)
Drift(clocks) ==
    [i \in 1..N |-> 
        IF clocks[i] < Avg(clocks) THEN 1
        ELSE IF clocks[i] > Avg(clocks) THEN -1
        ELSE 0
    ]

(* Next-state relation: each node updates its clock by the drift, 
   then synchronises to the average *)
Next ==
    LET newClocks == [i \in 1..N |-> clocks[i] + Drift(clocks)[i]]
    IN clocks' = [i \in 1..N |-> 
        IF Abs(newClocks[i] - Avg(newClocks)) <= epsilon THEN Avg(newClocks)
        ELSE newClocks[i]
    ]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_clocks

name: Peterson's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Peterson2 ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC

VARIABLES flag, turn

(* flag is a sequence of two booleans: flag[0] and flag[1] *)
(* turn is an integer: 0 or 1 *)

(* Initial state *)
Init == /\ flag = [i \in 0..1 |-> FALSE]
        /\ turn = 0

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == 
    (* Process 0 *)
    \/ /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![0] = TRUE]
        /\ turn' = 1
        /\ flag[1] /\ turn = 1
        /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![0] = FALSE]
    \/ (* Process 1 *)
      /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![1] = TRUE]
        /\ turn' = 0
        /\ flag[0] /\ turn = 0
        /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![1] = FALSE]
    \/ (* No change *)
      /\ UNCHANGED <<flag, turn>>

(* Specification *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<flag, turn>>

(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK == /\ flag \in [0..1 -> BOOLEAN]
          /\ turn \in 0..1

name: Gossip Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE GossipProtocol ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC

CONSTANTS N, Updates

VARIABLES infected, updates

(* Infected is a set of node IDs that have received the gossip update *)
(* Updates is a set of update IDs that have been disseminated *)

(* TypeOK ensures that the variables have the correct type *)
TypeOK == 
    /\ infected \subseteq 1..N
    /\ updates \subseteq Updates

(* Init: Initially, no node is infected and no updates have been disseminated *)
Init == 
    /\ infected = {}
    /\ updates = {}

(* Next: In each round, every infected node spreads the gossip to all nodes *)
Next == 
    /\ updates' = updates \cup Updates
    /\ infected' = infected \cup 1..N

(* Spec: The system evolves according to Init and Next *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<infected, updates>>

(* Liveness property: Eventually, all nodes become infected *)
Liveness == <> (infected = 1..N)

name: Publish-Subscribe Broker
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Broker ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC

VARIABLES
    subscribers,  \* [topic -> set of subscriber IDs]
    messages,     \* [topic -> sequence of messages]
    nextMsgId,    \* [topic -> Nat] next message ID to assign
    nextSubId     \* Nat next subscriber ID to assign

(* Type definitions *)
Topic == [name: STRING]
SubscriberId == Nat
Message == [id: Nat, content: STRING]
MessageSeq == Seq(Message)

(* Helper functions *)
IsSubscriber(subId, topic) == subId \in subscribers[topic]
IsMessage(msg, topic) == msg \in messages[topic]
NextMsgId(topic) == nextMsgId[topic]
NextSubId == nextSubId

(* Initial state *)
Init ==
    /\ subscribers \in [Topic -> SUBSET SubscriberId]
    /\ messages \in [Topic -> MessageSeq]
    /\ nextMsgId \in [Topic -> Nat]
    /\ nextSubId \in Nat
    /\ \A topic \in DOMAIN subscribers:
        subscribers[topic] = {}
    /\ \A topic \in DOMAIN messages:
        messages[topic] = <<>>
    /\ \A topic \in DOMAIN nextMsgId:
        nextMsgId[topic] = 0
    /\ nextSubId = 0

(* Register a new subscriber for a topic *)
Register(subId, topic) ==
    /\ subId \notin subscribers[topic]
    /\ subscribers' = [subscribers EXCEPT ![topic] = @ \cup {subId}]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<messages, nextMsgId, nextSubId>>

(* Post a new message on a topic *)
Post(topic, content) ==
    /\ nextMsgId[topic] = nextMsgId[topic]  \* ensure topic exists
    /\ newMsg == [id: nextMsgId[topic], content: content]
    /\ messages' = [messages EXCEPT ![topic] = Append(@, newMsg)]
    /\ nextMsgId' = [nextMsgId EXCEPT ![topic] = @ + 1]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<subscribers, nextSubId>>

(* Deliver messages to subscribers *)
Deliver(subId, topic) ==
    /\ IsSubscriber(subId, topic)
    /\ \E msg \in messages[topic]:
        /\ IsMessage(msg, topic)
        /\ DeliverTo(subId, msg)  \* external action
    /\ UNCHANGED <<subscribers, messages, nextMsgId, nextSubId>>

(* Next state *)
Next ==
    \/ \E subId, topic: Register(subId, topic)
    \/ \E topic, content: Post

name: Dekker's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Dekker ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC

VARIABLES turn, wants

(* Type definitions *)
turn \in {1, 2}
wants[1] \in BOOLEAN
wants[2] \in BOOLEAN

(* Initial state *)
Init == /\ turn \in {1, 2}
        /\ wants[1] \in BOOLEAN
        /\ wants[2] \in BOOLEAN
        /\ turn = 1
        /\ wants[1] = FALSE
        /\ wants[2] = FALSE

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == \/ /\ wants[1] = FALSE
              /\ wants[2] = FALSE
              /\ turn = 1
              /\ turn' = 2
              /\ wants[1]' = FALSE
              /\ wants[2]' = FALSE
        \/ /\ wants[1] = FALSE
              /\ wants[2] = FALSE
              /\ turn = 2
              /\ turn' = 1
              /\ wants[1]' = FALSE
              /\ wants[2]' = FALSE
        \/ /\ wants[1] = FALSE
              /\ wants[2] = FALSE
              /\ turn = 1
              /\ wants[1]' = TRUE
              /\ wants[2]' = FALSE
        \/ /\ wants[1] = FALSE
              /\ wants[2] = FALSE
              /\ turn = 2
              /\ wants[1]' = FALSE
              /\ wants[2]' = TRUE
        \/ /\ wants[1] = TRUE
              /\ wants[2] = FALSE
              /\ turn = 1
              /\ turn' = 2
              /\ wants[1]' = TRUE
              /\ wants[2]' = FALSE
        \/ /\ wants[1] = TRUE
              /\ wants[2] = FALSE
              /\ turn = 2
              /\ turn' = 1
              /\ wants[1]' = TRUE
              /\ wants[2]' = FALSE
        \/ /\ wants[1] = FALSE
              /\ wants[2] = TRUE
              /\ turn = 1
              /\ turn' = 2
              /\ wants[1]' = FALSE
              /\ wants[2]' = TRUE
        \/ /\ wants[1] = FALSE
              /\ wants[2] = TRUE
              /\ turn = 2
              /\ turn' = 1
              /\ wants[1]' = FALSE
              /\ wants[2]' = TRUE
        \/ /\ wants[1] = TRUE
              /\ wants[2] = TRUE
              /\ turn = 1
              /\ turn' = 2
              /\ wants[1]' = TRUE
              /\ wants[2]' = TRUE

name: Eventually Consistent Counter
generated_spec:
---- MODULE GCounter ----
EXTENDS Naturals, TLC

CONSTANTS Node

VARIABLES counts

(* counts is a matrix: counts[n][m] is the count that node n has for node m *)
Init ==
  /\ counts \in [Node -> [Node -> Nat]]
  /\ \A n \in Node: \A m \in Node: counts[n][m] = 0

(* Increment operation: node n increments its own slot *)
Increment(n) ==
  /\ n \in Node
  /\ counts' = [counts EXCEPT ![n][n] = counts[n][n] + 1]
  /\ UNCHANGED <<>>

(* Merge operation: node n merges its counts with node m *)
Merge(n, m) ==
  /\ n \in Node
  /\ m \in Node
  /\ counts' = [counts EXCEPT ![n][m] = Max(counts[n][m], counts[m][m])]
  /\ UNCHANGED <<>>

Next ==
  \E n \in Node:
    \/ Increment(n)
    \/ \E m \in Node: Merge(n, m)

(* Global count is the sum over all nodes of the maximum count for each node *)
GlobalCount ==
  \Sum n \in Node: \Max_{m \in Node} counts[m][n]

Spec ==
  Init /\ [][Next]_<<counts>>

TypeOK ==
  /\ counts \in [Node -> [Node -> Nat]]
  /\ \A n \in Node: \A m \in Node: counts[n][m] \in Nat
